title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at MakeMyTrip Hotels

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at MakeMyTrip Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, MakeMyTrip Hotels in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MakeMyTrip Hotels:
MakeMyTrip Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
